subject: docs(sancio): add API naming consistency spec for snake_case standardization
body:
Analysis found 10 camelCase request body fields + 1 camelCase response field
across 6 Sancio endpoints. This spec documents exact changes needed in both
tool-till-tees (backend) and sun-sea-o (frontend) to standardize on snake_case.

Tags: documentation, api, sancio, spec
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: api
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: api-naming-consistency
Semver: patch
